summary: Successfully tested and validated the dashboard layout balance tweak. The grid ratio was adjusted from 6.2fr:3.8fr to 6fr:4fr, making the right panel (Weekly Program) slightly wider and left panel (Today Tasks) slightly narrower for better visual balance.
passed_tests: Weekly Program day labels render on a single row without wrapping
Full day names remain intact (no abbreviations) - all 7 Turkish day names display correctly
Right panel is now slightly wider (717px vs 681px) and left panel slightly narrower (1075px vs 1111px)
Dashboard layout maintains balanced and premium feel after ratio adjustment
No regressions in Weekly Program tab interactions
No regressions in Today Tasks layout or functionality
Add task dialog functionality works correctly
Layout responsive at different screen sizes (1920px, 1366px tested)
Grid layout classes updated correctly to lg:grid-cols-[minmax(0,6fr)_minmax(0,4fr)]
Panel ratio improved from 1.63 to 1.50 for better balance
